title: Senior Business Partner / Director (Private Client Advisory)
description:
Company:
Leading Global Securities Brokerage Platform

Company Overview

The company is an internationally recognised securities brokerage platform with licensed entities across major global financial markets. It provides high-net-worth individuals and professional investors with institutional-grade market access and comprehensive investment solutions.
We invite experienced financial professionals with strong client networks and industry expertise to join the platform as Business Partners, operating within a robust and well-established compliance framework.

Role Overview

This role is designed for senior professionals with extensive industry experience, strong private and institutional client relationships, and proven team leadership capabilities. As a Senior Business Partner / Director, you will be responsible for regional business strategy, leading professional teams to drive sustainable growth, and leveraging the platform’s regulatory licences and global resources to enhance client service delivery.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and execute regional business development strategies and lead teams to achieve performance objectives
  • Acquire, manage, and grow relationships with high-net-worth individuals and institutional clients, providing holistic solutions including asset allocation and investment strategies
  • Build, train, and manage investment advisory teams
  • Represent the platform at industry events and professional forums to enhance brand presence
  • Contribute to business innovation initiatives and service optimisation decisions

Requirements

  • Extensive experience in private banking, wealth management, or securities brokerage, including significant team leadership exposure
  • Established and sustainable high-net-worth client relationships with strong business development capability
  • Strong expertise in cross-market asset allocation and portfolio management
  • Professional certifications such as CFA, CFP, or equivalent, with solid knowledge of regulatory and compliance requirements
  • Demonstrated leadership, strategic thinking, and execution capabilities
  • Proficiency in English and Chinese to support business operations and client engagement across relevant markets.

Compensation & Benefits

  • Competitive partner-level revenue sharing and incentive structure
  • High degree of business autonomy and decision-making authority
  • Comprehensive operational, compliance, and professional support
  • Access to a global business and client network
  • Customised career and partnership development pathways

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • An accomplished financial professional with strong industry experience and client networks seeking a scalable platform for long-term growth
  • A leader who excels in team building and business expansion, with a focus on sustainable value creation
  • Motivated to establish a long-term, strategic partnership with a high-quality global platform


TRULYYY PTE. LTD.

Senior Consultant

Yang Suyu
